mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.category, t.subject, u.name AS member_name, DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS created_at_str, t.status, CASE WHEN t.priority IN ('HIGH','URGENT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS priority, COALESCE(u.plan, 'FREE') AS plan, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS joined_at FROM support_ticket t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT m.id, CASE WHEN m.sender_type = 'ADMIN' THEN 'admin' ELSE 'user' END AS who, CASE WHEN m.sender_type = 'ADMIN' THEN '관리자' ELSE u.name END AS name, DATE_FORMAT(m.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS time_str, m.content, m.is_internal FROM support_ticket_message m LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = m.sender_id AND m.sender_type != 'ADMIN' WHERE m.ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY m.created_at
SELECT content FROM support_ticket_message WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND is_internal = 1 AND sender_type = 'ADMIN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE support_ticket SET status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE support_ticket SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_ticket_message (ticket_id, sender_type, sender_id, content, is_internal) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{internal})
